title: Spudcasting
description: Spudcasting in real. For the 24w14potato april fools update.
body:
Poisonous potatoes contain an intelligence still poorly understood by science. For the 2024 potato April Fools snapshot.

To leverage it, put stacks of poisonous potatoes (and other things) in a chest, then shift-right click it with another poisonous potato in hand. Each different stack size is a different opcode. Execution is stack-based, and goes across the inventory in slot order.

[Check out the Github readme for a video of it because it won't embed in Modrinth for some reason](https://github.com/gamma-delta/spudcasting)
